main.description: Membership intent. Written to the USER's PDS — one record per community joined. The rkey is a TID; the community is identified by the 'community' field, not the rkey (DIDs contain ':' which isn't valid in rkeys). Paired with com.wumblr.membershipProof on the community's PDS; both are required for active membership. Modeled after community.opensocial.membership.
